legal.provisionalNotice: Provisional text pending specialised legal review for Spain/EU.

notice.title: Provisional legal notice for AILinkCinema / CID
notice.description: This legal notice is a provisional version to accompany the commercial product demo. It must be completed with company identification, contact details and final clauses before any official publication or stable commercial exploitation.

nature.title: 1. Nature of the site
nature.p1: This website and its associated views preliminarily present AILinkCinema / CID as a platform for AI-assisted audiovisual development, production and coordination.
nature.p2: The content available in this demo is intended for informational, commercial and product-validation purposes.

responsible.title: 2. Controller information
responsible.p1: The full identification of the responsible entity, address, tax ID, contact channels and other mandatory details are not yet specified in this provisional version.
responsible.p2: This information must be added and verified before any definitive public deployment.

content.title: 3. Use of content
content.p1: The texts, interfaces, visual concepts and materials shown in this demo are provided to evaluate the product and its commercial proposal. No general licence for reuse, redistribution or exploitation of these materials should be assumed without express authorisation.

availability.title: 4. Service availability
availability.p1: As this is a technical or commercial demo, certain functions may be subject to changes, limitations, temporary incidents or deactivation without prior notice.
availability.p2: The mere presence of a feature in the demo does not imply permanent contractual availability or a definitive SLA.

limitation.title: 5. Provisional limitation of statements
limitation.p1: This environment should not be interpreted as a legally closed offer, nor as a full guarantee of availability, exhaustive regulatory compliance, suitability for a specific use or absolute absence of errors.

finalVersion.title: 6. Final version pending
finalVersion.p1: Before a formal public launch, this legal notice must be completed with specialised review, controller details, intellectual property policy, applicable jurisdiction and definitive website-use clauses.

privacy.title: Provisional privacy policy for the AILinkCinema / CID demo
privacy.description: This text provisionally summarises how information may be processed in a CID commercial demo. It must be reviewed and completed before any public deployment or commercial activity at scale.

purpose.title: 1. Purpose of this page
purpose.p1: This policy provisionally explains what data may be collected during an AILinkCinema / CID demo and for which operational purposes it may be used.
purpose.p2: Its goal is to provide clear information during the product demonstration phase. It does not replace a formal legal review or a definitive policy adapted to the real exploitation context.

data.title: 2. Data that may be processed
data.p1: During use of the landing page or a guided demo, contact and professional-context data may be processed, for example: name, email, company, role, project needs and messages sent through forms.
data.p2: Internal product flows may also contain operational data associated with users, projects, documents or materials that the demo team voluntarily uploads to validate functionality.

uses.title: 3. Provisional purposes of processing
uses.intro: Provisionally, the data may be used to:
uses.itemDemo: - respond to demo or commercial contact requests
uses.itemProjects: - organise demo projects, materials and validation flows
uses.itemTraceability: - maintain basic operational traceability of internal platform use

basis.title: 4. Basis and limits of use
basis.p1: At this stage, only the information necessary to handle the request, enable the demo or evaluate the product should be used. Broad, indefinite or reusable processing for other purposes should not be automatically assumed without an appropriate basis and a definitive policy.

retention.title: 5. Retention and access
retention.p1: Demo data should only be retained for the time necessary for the preliminary commercial relationship, technical validation or follow-up of the corresponding pilot.
retention.p2: Access should be limited to the internal team necessary for operations, support or commercial continuity of the demo.

providers.title: 6. Providers and third parties
providers.p1: The platform may depend on technical infrastructure, email services, storage or auxiliary tools. This text does not yet state a closed list of processors or a complete contractual framework; that relationship must be documented in the final legal version.

rights.title: 7. Rights and contact
rights.p1: If a person wants to request clarification, rectification or deletion of data used in a demo, they should be able to contact the responsible team through the commercial or operational channels enabled by AILinkCinema.
rights.p2: The final version must specify the data controller, contact channels, definitive legal basis, deadlines and procedure for exercising rights.

terms.title: Provisional access and use terms for the CID demo
terms.description: These terms provisionally describe how the AILinkCinema / CID demo environment should be used. They are not yet final contractual terms and do not replace a complete legal review.

access.title: 1. Demo access
access.p1: Access to CID during this phase is offered for demonstration, commercial evaluation, internal testing or a controlled pilot.
access.p2: Some accounts may have immediate access and others may be subject to review, manual activation or validation by the responsible team.

allowed.title: 2. Permitted use
allowed.intro: Provisionally, the user should use the demo only to:
allowed.itemExplore: - explore the platform and its flows
allowed.itemMaterials: - upload owned materials with sufficient permission for the test
allowed.itemCollaborate: - collaborate with the team in the context of a demo or pilot

forbidden.title: 3. Prohibited use
forbidden.intro: During the demo, the platform should not be used for:
forbidden.itemRights: - uploading materials without sufficient rights or permissions
forbidden.itemSecurity: - attempting to compromise security, access, operational limits or account isolation
forbidden.itemFinalService: - presenting the demo as a guaranteed final service while it is still under evaluation

productStatus.title: 4. Product status
productStatus.p1: CID may include evolving features, limited modules or capabilities subject to change. The demo shows product direction and operational value, but it should not automatically be interpreted as a closed functional commitment for every environment.

accounts.title: 5. Accounts, access and suspension
accounts.p1: Access may be limited, paused or withdrawn if there are technical incidents, misuse, maintenance needs or changes in the commercial scope of the pilot or demo.

materials.title: 6. Materials and results
materials.p1: Materials uploaded by the user and results generated during a demo must be treated with caution. This text does not yet establish a definitive intellectual-property, licensing, retention or export framework; that framework must be defined in later contractual documentation.

future.title: 7. Future contractual version
future.p1: Before stable commercial use, these terms must be replaced by complete conditions adapted to the business model, the applicable market and the actual treatment of data, content and deliverables.

aiContent.title: Provisional use of AI and content in the CID demo
aiContent.description: This page honestly and provisionally summarises some conditions around materials, analyses and results generated or assisted by AI within the demo. It does not replace a definitive policy for intellectual property, compliance or content processing.

assisted.title: 1. Assisted nature of the system
assisted.p1: CID may help structure, analyse, visualise or present audiovisual projects through software- and AI-assisted processes. Results should be understood as operational and creative support, not as an automatic replacement for human professional judgement.

userMaterials.title: 2. User-provided materials
userMaterials.p1: During a demo, any script, treatment, document, image or reference should only be uploaded if the person or entity providing it has sufficient rights, permissions or legitimacy to use it in that context.

outputs.title: 3. Generated or transformed results
outputs.p1: Demo outputs may include analyses, visual proposals, storyboards, project structures, summaries or derived materials. Their creative, legal, technical or commercial validity must be reviewed before any real use, external dissemination or later exploitation.

limitations.title: 4. Limitations and cautions
limitations.p1: At this stage, it should not be assumed that every AI-generated result is accurate, complete, original, free of rights conflicts or suitable for contractual use without additional review.
limitations.p2: Nor should it be assumed that a demo alone defines the final regime for ownership, licensing, training, retention or reuse of materials and results.

humanReview.title: 5. Mandatory human review
humanReview.p1: Creative, editorial, production, legal or distribution decisions must remain under human supervision. The CID demo is presented as a support and coordination layer, not as full automation of audiovisual work.

finalPolicy.title: 6. Final policy pending
finalPolicy.p1: Before stable commercial use, a complete written framework must be defined for material ingestion, rights, responsibility for prompts and results, asset retention, and limits on the use of AI-assisted features.

hero.title: AILinkCinema studies each audiovisual client's real needs and applies AI to solve concrete problems.
hero.subtitle: We do not sell generic AI: we identify real bottlenecks in production companies, direction, post-production, sales and distribution, then turn them into modular solutions or CID Studio, the complete system from script to production, sales and distribution materials.
hero.support: Built for production companies, directors, technical teams, studios, distributors and post-production crews.

what.title: What AILinkCinema is and what it does
what.body: AILinkCinema works as a consulting-product layer: it analyzes real audiovisual client needs, identifies operational and creative problems, then deploys applied AI through modular solutions or CID Studio.
what.point1: It starts with diagnosis: processes, materials, roles, deliverables and client blockers.
what.point2: Then it proposes modular solutions born from real problems detected in clients.
what.point3: When full coverage is needed, CID Studio connects script, production, sales and distribution.

problems.title: Problems it solves for production companies, directors, technical teams and distributors
problems.card1Body: AILinkCinema does not force a closed package: it studies the real case and selects the right modular solution.
problems.card2Body: It applies AI where friction exists: reading, breakdowns, transcription, search, commercial preparation and delivery.
problems.card3Body: It connects script, feedback, visual materials, editing and distribution so each decision can be retrieved and reused.
problems.card4Body: Modular solutions can work alone or integrate into CID Studio when the project requires full continuity.

modules.title: Existing modular solutions
modules.subtitle: Initial catalog of solutions born from real problems detected in audiovisual clients.

standalone.title: What can be acquired separately and what each solution is for
standalone.body: Each modular solution can be hired independently when the client needs to solve a specific problem without deploying the complete CID Studio system.

cidSuite.title: What CID Studio includes as a complete system
cidSuite.body: CID Studio is AILinkCinema's complete solution: it connects script, analysis, visual development, breakdown, feedback, editorial intelligence, sales and distribution in one operational workflow.
cidSuite.point1: Centralized governance of assets, processes and outputs.
cidSuite.point2: Modular solution activation depending on client, role and project phase.
cidSuite.point3: From script to production, sales and distribution materials.

useCases.title: Real-world use cases
useCases.case1Body: Accelerate development, budgeting, commercial materials and coordination across departments.
useCases.case2Body: Generate storyboards, visual references, creative selects and decision layers faster.
useCases.case3Body: Search by content, build paper edits and connect outputs with DaVinci Resolve, Avid Media Composer and Adobe Premiere Pro.
useCases.case4Body: Prepare launch packages, audience analysis and dossiers for buyers and partners.

pricing.title: Pricing and plans
pricing.starterBody: License or service focused on a single problem with a constrained deployment.
pricing.starterMeta: Ideal for pilots and initial adoption
pricing.suiteBody: Complete system for organizations that need to cover from script to production, sales and distribution materials.
pricing.enterpriseBody: Controlled deployment, onboarding, support and configuration aligned with security, teams and workload.
pricing.enterpriseMeta: Designed for studios and complex organizations

demo.title: Demo / contact / onboarding
demo.body: The commercial strategy starts with diagnosis, a controlled demo and guided onboarding before activating a modular solution or CID Studio.
demo.point1: Commercial demo aligned with real client scenarios.
demo.point2: Contact path for evaluating standalone solutions or CID Studio.
demo.point3: Phased onboarding by role, team and business goals.

footer.line: AILinkCinema diagnoses real needs and commercializes modular solutions or CID Studio for film and audiovisual operations.

finishedScript.q: Do I need to have a finished script?
finishedScript.a: No. We accept treatments, outlines, project documentation or even developed ideas. The more material you have, the more complete the analysis will be.

aiSupervision.a: No. AI accelerates processing, but all analysis is reviewed and validated by our professional team before being delivered to you.

ownership.a: Yes. All the material you send us remains 100% yours. We do not use it to train models or share it with third parties without your explicit authorization.

pitching.a: Yes. The mini pitching dossier is specifically designed to present your project to production companies, financing funds or platforms.

productionCompany.q: Can I use it with a production company?
productionCompany.a: Yes. In fact, it is designed so production companies and directors can validate projects before investing time and resources in development.

fullStoryboard.q: Can a storyboard be generated for the whole film?
fullStoryboard.a: The pilot focuses on key sequences. If you need a full storyboard, we can design a custom plan with our team.

finalCta.title: Validate your project before investing more time and money
finalCta.subtitle: Discover the real potential of your script with professional analysis. No commitment.

footer.description: Artificial intelligence for film, television and advertising with specialized software, CID as the central system and real technical support.
footer.note: AILinkCinema positions CID as a complete audiovisual production system and articulates specialized solutions for each department.

clientFeedbackMemory.title: Client Feedback Memory

comfyuiWorkflow.description: Organizes and exploits complex visual workflows for teams working with generative pipelines.

distributionAudience.title: Distribution & Audience
distributionAudience.description: Supports launch strategies, audience analysis and distribution material preparation.

editorialNleBridge.title: Editorial Intelligence & NLE Bridge
editorialNleBridge.description: Editorial intelligence system for ingestion, timecode transcription, character diarization, semantic search, selects, paper edit, markers, timelines and export/interaction with DaVinci Resolve, Avid Media Composer and Adobe Premiere Pro.
editorialNleBridge.independent: Sold as a standalone product for editorial and post-production teams.
editorialNleBridge.included: Also included inside CID Studio as a strategic high-value solution.
editorialNleBridge.nles: Commercially positioned around DaVinci Resolve, Avid Media Composer and Adobe Premiere Pro interoperability.
